caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storms Intensify
caribbean.paragraph: St. Lucia is experiencing 88% rain probability with winds of 10 kt and wave heights of 3.9 ft, while Antigua is seeing winds of 14 kt. I expect the Eastern Caribbean to be impacted by these conditions, with St. Lucia being the top impact port due to the high rain probability and moderate wave heights.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing 23 kt winds with 5.8 ft wave heights and a 38% rain probability, while nearby ports have significantly lighter conditions, such as Naples with 13 kt winds and less than 10% rain probability. The dominant swell direction from the north at 7 seconds will impact navigation and outdoor activities in Mykonos today.
